docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BARSANA, REMEDIOS ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT NAB, A. MAC ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NAB, A. MAC BARSANA, REMEDIOS
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, CHRIS COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/JOSEPH SACRA- MENTO AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1369 26TH AVE, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVIC- TION STAYED TO 2-14-94, 5PM - NO FURTHER STAYS ON EVICTION - ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - MUTUTAL RELEAS OF ALL CLAIMS - PL. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT/LAST MO. RENT & ANY INTEREST ACCRUED - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL/LEASE AGREEMENT - DEF. CERTIFIES NO OTHER ADULTS LIVE ON PREMISES - DEF. TO LEAVE PREMISES IN CLEAN CONDITION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, CHRIS TAN, PEARL AS TO DEFENDANT NAB, A. MAC BARSANA, REMEDIOS DOES I - X SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, CHRIS TAN, PEARL SERVED NOV-20-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I - X
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, CHRIS TAN, PEARL SERVED NOV-20-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I - X

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAB, A. MAC BARSANA, REMEDIOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1369 - 26TH AVENUE, SF., STAYED UNTIL FEB-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES UNPAID RENT/DAMAGES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS PHYSICAL EVICTION IS STAYED TO 2/14/94, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION FOR ANY REASON. NO FURTHER CLAIMS MAY BE MADE BY EITHER SIDE. DEFTS STIP NO OTHER ADULTS HAVE ANY CLAIM TO PREMISES. PLTF TO RETAIN SEC DEP.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAB, A. MAC BARSANA, REMEDIOS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, CHRIS TAN, PEARL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT NAB, A. MAC BARSANA, REMEDIOS
